title: Child Workflow: Compliance - ServiceNow Incidents
description: Opens a ServiceNow incident for each non-compliant device (if one is not already open). Closes incidents for devices that are now compliant. One incident per device — not per violation.

assignment_group.description: ServiceNow assignment group for new incidents

incidents_created.description: Incidents newly opened this scan run

incidents_closed.description: Incidents closed because the device is now compliant

internal_steps: 1. Filter scan_results.device_results for non_compliant + partial devices
a. getIncidents — search by device_name in short_description
b. If no open incident → createIncident with violation summary
a. getIncidents — search for open incident by device_name
b. If open incident found → updateIncident (state=resolved)
